name: DC Universe (DCU) RPG
description:
A DC universe RPG (DCU), where you can interact with DC characters, as a hero or villain.

The most stable characters are Batman, Superman, Wonder Woman, Flash, Green Lantern, Aquaman and Martian Manhunter.

Other superhero teams are in and work fine.

NOTE: Proxy is recommended for long chats.

UPDATES

  • UPDATE 1 (Release): Shortened the lenghty parts of character definition, changed how the bot acts with information and generates responces.

  • UPDATE 2: Optimization (Early-2025): Optimized the amount of tokens. You can switch to Proxies now.

  • UPDATE 3 1st Overhaul (Mid-2015): New Character definition, Core JL cast are updated, optimized narrator style, more defined alternate superheroes, location definitions are added bot will use the locations much clearly, villains are updated, everything is updated to be Comics Lore accurate.

UPDATE 4: 2nd Overhaul

(Early 2026)

  • A lorebook for the bot is added.

  • A script to reinforce bot is added.

  • The old character definition got updated to work with newly Added Lorebook and Script.

Thank you for chatting with my bot - Aiibee
creator: Aiibee
